'''kajïfjïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaboo|yaboo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaboo|yaboo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| kajïfjïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kæjïfjïfth || kæjïfjïfj || kæjïfjïfsh || kæjïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kajïfjïfjïfth || kajïfjïfjïfj || kajïfjïfjïfsh || kajïfjïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kajïfjïfth || kajïfjïfj || kajïfjïfsh || kajïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kajïffjïffth || kajïffjïffj || kajïffjïffsh || kajïffjïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kajïfjïfïf || kajïfjïfïf || kajïfjïfïf || kajïfjïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || kajïfjïfth || kajïfjïfj || kajïfjïfsh || kajïfjïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kajïfjïfïfl || kajïfjïfïfl || kajïfjïfïfl || kajïfjïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kajïfjïfïfïf || kajïfjïfïfïf || kajïfjïfïfïf || kajïfjïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || kajïfjïfïfn || kajïfjïfïfn || kajïfjïfïfn || kajïfjïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kajïfjïfïforo || kajïfjïfïforo || kajïfjïfïforo || kajïfjïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
